homePage.suggestion2Desc: Apply urea before the next crop cycle.

soilScan.title: Soil Scan
soilScan.subtitle: Capture or upload soil image for quick nutrient and moisture insights.
soilScan.uploadHint: Upload a soil sample photo to begin.
soilScan.result: Soil moisture is moderate and pH appears near neutral. Add compost in next irrigation cycle.

cropScan.title: Crop Scan
cropScan.subtitle: Upload or capture crop photo for disease diagnosis and treatment suggestions.
cropScan.uploadHint: Upload a crop image to detect disease.
cropScan.result: Probable issue: Leaf Rust (high confidence). Suggested action: apply recommended organic fungicide.
